layout.spacing_scale: Use p-6 to p-32, generous spacing for premium feel
layout.grid_system: Asymmetrical bento grids with gap-8 to gap-12

components.button: Rounded-full, premium feel. Primary buttons use bg-[#7C3AED] with text-white and shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.4)]. Hover changes to bg-[#A78BFA] and intensifies glow.
components.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl. Hover state: border-[#7C3AED]/50 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(124,58,237,0.15)] -translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300.
components.header: Fixed top-0 w-full z-50. Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-[#030108]/70 border-b border-white/5.
components.footer: Deep dark solid background bg-[#030108], py-20, multi-column layout.
components.whatsapp_float: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#22C55E] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.4)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center

animations.scroll_reveal: Staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0) using framer-motion.
animations.hover: Smooth scale up (scale-105) and enhanced border/shadow glow on cards.
animations.parallax: Subtle slow movement on background images and floating planet.
animations.floating: Continuous slow y-axis translate (animate={{ y: [-10, 10, -10] }} with duration 6s) on astronaut and hero mockups.
animations.background_effects: Blinking stars (opacity keyframes), moving particles, and glowing orbital lines in the background.

media.description: Purple planet shining against dark cosmos (Use as overlay/bg in Hero)
Astronaut in white spacesuit (Use in Support and Final CTA)
Sleek modern aesthetic clinic dark website mockup

sections: 1. HEADER PREMIUM: Logo, Navigation, CTA WhatsApp
2. HERO: Headline with 'resultados' glowing, 2 CTAs, Mockups on right, Giant Planet & Orbits in bg
3. STRIP DE CONFIANÇA: Stats (+50 companies, 5 stars, etc.)
4. SERVIÇOS: 5 premium cards, Full-Stack highlighted. Hover glow.
5. TEMPLATES: Carousel of 5 models, from R$ 499
8. PLANOS: 3 pricing cards (Growth highlighted) + side section for Support with Astronaut
9. CTA FINAL: Massive WhatsApp button, floating astronaut bg

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' for all scroll reveals and floating animations.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Add font 'Unbounded' for headings and 'Manrope' for body from Google Fonts in index.html.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements, buttons, and links.
In the Hero section, wrap the word 'resultados' in a span with text-[#A78BFA] and drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(167,139,250,0.8)].

For the cosmic background, create a wrapper div with absolute positioning, -z-10, and a dark gradient `bg-gradient-to-b from-[#030108] via-[#0A071A] to-[#030108]`. Add animated SVG stars/particles over it.
The 'MAIS ESCOLHIDO' badge on the Growth plan should use bg-[#7C3AED] with a pulse animation.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp button is persistent across scroll.
